titleStmt.title: SII 15.32: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 32. (B.K. No. 96 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall (left side) of the Saṁgamēśvara temple.
This is dated the 10th regnal year of the king, Prabhava, Chaitra, ba. 5. Monday, Vishu-saṁkrānti (wrong for Mēsha-saṁkrānti), corresponding to 1147 A.D., March 24.

It registers the grant of the village Nāgavāḍa in Hebbāḷu Twelve, a kaṁpaṇa of Tarddavāḍi Thousand, made by the king, at the request of Mahāsāmantādhipati, Mahāpradhāna, Haḍapad-adhishṭhāyaka, Manevergaḍe, Sēnādhipati Bammaṇayya to the temple of Śivaliṅgadēva at the agrahāra of Muttage, situated in Muttage Thirty, a subdivision of Tarddavāḍi Thousand. The temple is stated to have been constructed by Śivarāja-chamūpa who also built another temple at Vijayāpura (modern Bijapur) called Jagadēkapura. The gift is stated to have been made with the consent of Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Kumāra Bijjaḷadēva, apparently of the Kalachuri family, thus showing that he was already holding a responsible position. The religious establishment was placed in charge of Lakuḷīśvara who belonged to a line of Śaiva teachers hailing from Kāśmīra, that had settled at Vijayāpura. The genealogy of the Chālukyas from Tailapa down to Jagadēkamalla is given. A gift of one pon derived from Baṇṇige tax is stated to have been made annually to the same temple by Herggaḍe Bammarasa, an officer of Daṇḍanāyaka Maiḷāra who is described as the amātya of Bijjaḷa-nṛipa and governing Tarddavāḍi-nāḍu. This is followed by some more gifts.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraśtuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . Ōṁ namaśśivāya
śrīkaṁṭhanityarūpaṁ nirupamamahimaṁ viśvalōkādhināthaṁ śrī kāṁtāṁbhōjajanma pramukhasa�ragaṇastū
yamānaṁ mahēśaṁ lōkālōkaikabījaṁ paśupatiśivaliṁgaṁ jitānaṁganī bhūlōkakke llaṁdadiṁdaṁ śubha
mananudinaṁ māḍugācaṁdratāraṁ . śrīkāṁtākāṁtanātmōdarabhavanadoḷūṁdarkkaṟiṁ baytupaytaṁ lōkālōkaṁgaḷaṁ kāvanu
pamamahimaṁ viśvalōkaikavajra prākāraṁ viśvarūpaṁ jitadanujakuḷaṁ pāḷitāśēṣa nākānīkaṁ pāḷikke dhātrīvaḷayamana
khiḷādhāranācaṁdratāraṁ . śrīmatraibhuvanaikanētrenakhiḷapradyōtitajyōti riksāmātharbba yajurmmayaṁ hariviriṁcēśānarū
paṁ prabhōddāvaṁ viśvajagakkameyde śivaliṁgāsthānasaṁsthaṁ tamastōmadhvaṁsakaraṁ karaṁ beḷagu�rkkuṁ caṁdratārānvitaṁ . śrīcāḷukyakuḷābja .
muḷḷalaralatyutsāhadiṁ viśvadhātrīcakrakkanurāgamāgaludayaṁgeydaṁ caḷukyānvaya prācīnācaḷadoḷnarēṁdra
nutanudyanmaṁḍaḷāgrōllasadrōciprasphuritapracaṁḍakaranurbbīpāḷapaṁ taiḷapaṁ . Ene nagaḷda tailapadēvana tanayaṁ śauryyaśāḷi sa
tyāśrayadēvanatarkkyavikramaṁ bhūvanitēśaṁ rājarājananupamatējaṁ . Atuḷabaḷarādarā bhūpatige sutarvvikramāṁkana
yyaṇadēvaṁ pratipakṣanṛpanṛsiṁhapratimaṁ jayasiṁhaneṁbarurbbigadhīśaraṁ . śrī jayasiṁha narēṁdratanūjaṁ trailōkyamalla
nāhavamallaṁ tējōnidhi tatsutanadhirājaṁ bhuṣanaikamalladēvaṁ nagarddaṁ . vinutaṁ tadbhū vallabhananujātaṁ viṣṇuvarddhanaṁ śrīma
ttribhuvanamalladēvanā nṛpatanayaṁ bhūlōkamalladēvanarēṁdraṁ . Agaṇitavikrama nātana maganuddhatavairivaṁśavanadavadaha
naṁ jagadēkamalladēvaṁ negaḷdirddaṁ ripunṟipāḷamastakaśūḷaṁ . Ā naranāthana maneyoḷu tānasadaṁ barṁmmadēvadaṁḍādhīśaṁ śrīnātha
na maneyoḷu vinetānandananesavavolu sāhasatuṁgaṁ . barṁmmaṇadaṁḍanāthana mahōṁna tiyaṁ dhṛtiyaṁ caritramaṁ permmeyanīga
ḷeyde paribhāvisi nōḷpaḍe mēlenippanā dharmmatanūbhavaṁgenuta baṇnipudī jagamella moldu takkūrmmeyinandoḍe vogaḷvaniṁ po
gaḷvaṁ budhakalpavṛkṣanaṁ . Atuḷabaḷaṁ pratāpanidhi tāṁ padepiṁ jagadēkamallabhūpati besasalke hoysaḷananārddeṟeya
ṭṭi taguḷdu tūḷdu mārutiyavoloṁde dīṁkinoḷavaṁ biṟutaṁbudhivāydaneṁdoḍuddha tikeyināṁparārddhuradoḷī
kali barṁmmaṇadaṁḍanāthanaṁ . © Ene negardda puṇyapuṁjana maneyoḷu śubhacaritanenipa mādhavadēvaṁ trinayanana pore
yoḷabjāsananippavolirddhanamaḷaguṇagaṇaniḷayaṁ . sraṣṭaṁ tāṁ vāgvīryāvaṣṭaṁbhado ḷenisi negarddaneḷeyoḷmudade vaśiṣṭapravaraṁ
viprōtkṛṣṭaṁ śrī vēdamūrtti mādhavadēvaṁ . Ā vibhugaṁ sādhvi śrīdēvigumanurāga māge puṭṭidanakhiḷōrbbīvaḷayaṁ baṇnise bhūdēvōttamaneni
pa peṁpiniṁ śivarājaṁ . surasiṁdhurakke dānaṁ haricaṁdanataruge sakaḷasatphaḷamesevaṁtire barṁmmaṇadaṁḍādhipanarasutanakkesadu niṁdanī
śivarājaṁ . śivadēvaṁ bhaktiyiṁdaṁ bhayadineṟagidargganyasainyakke tāṁ bhairavadēvaṁ garbbhavāsasthitiyoḷu sukhadiṁdirppa lōkōktiyiṁ kēśavadēvaṁ tī
bratējaṁ diśevidiśegaḷaṁ tīvikoṁḍoppe tōrppā ravidēvaṁ bhūmidēvānvaya vimaḷa sarōjātasaṁbhūtanītaṁ . maṁneya kaṁjakuṁjara madōddhatemaṁne
ya rājarāhu śauryyōṁnatamaṁneyūdripati maṁneyapaṁnagavainatēya bhāśvaṁ narapāḷa maṁḍaḷika mauḷivighaṭṭita pādapīṭha bāppeṁnada
rārmmanōmudadinī śivarājananī dharitriyoḷ . jagamellaṁ taṁnaṁ maṟevuge . kāvaṁ mīṟi tōruvaṁ yamamukhamaṁ bagegoṁḍu bēḍidudanā
vagamīvaṁ dayeyinadaṭiniṁdārppiṁdaṁ . dharmmada parōpakārada permmeya nijarūpane saye manujākṛtiyiṁ nirmmisidanartthiyiṁde caturmmukhanene nega
ḷdaneḷeyoḷī śivarājaṁ . muttageyoḷnijōṁnatiya kīrttiya puṇyada puṁjadaṁte digbhittiyaneyde korbbi baḷedabjabhavāṁḍamaneydalēḷge lōkōtta
ramāge nirmmisidanutsavadiṁ ruciratrikūṭamopputtire dēvatāniḷayamaṁ śivarājacamūpana rtthiyiṁ . surucirakūṭatrayadiṁ pariraṁ
jipa dēgulaṁgaḷaṁ nirmmisidaṁ nirupamamahimaṁ vijayāpuradoḷu jagadēkapuradoḷī puravaradoḷu . © svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ .
śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmat pratāpacakrava
rtti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrā rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttaṁ kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukha
saṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ gayuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvitanuṁ mahāmātyapadavī virājitanuṁ samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtādhipa
ti mahāpradhānaṁ haḍapadadhiṣṭāyakaṁ maneverggaḍe sēnādhipati daṁḍanāyakaṁ baṁma ṇayyaṁ biṁnapaṁ geyyaladaṁdibyacittadalu kēḷdavadhā
risi tarddavāḍisāsirada baḷiya kaṁpaṇaṁ muttageya movattaṟa modala bāḍaṁ śrīmatsarbba namaśya duttamadagrahāraṁ muttageya śrī
śivaliṁgadēvargge Ā nāḍa baḷiya kaṁpaṇaṁ hebbāḷu haṁneraḍahoḷagaṇa nāgavāḍamaṁ sarbba namasyaṁ māḍi . svasti śrīmaccāḷukya pratāpacakrava
rtti jagadēkamalladēvaru svakīyarājyābhyudayada 10 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada caitra bahuḷa 5 sōmavāradaṁdana viṣu
saṁkrāṁti byatīpātaparbbanimittaṁ paramabhaktipūrbbakaṁ dayaṁ geydu kuḍalu samasta pradhānara śrī manmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kumāraṁ bijjaladē
varasara saurasediṁ patthaḷesahitaṁ paḍedu barada śāsanaṁ . © . va . śrīmat śivarājadaṁḍanā yakaṁ taṁniṁ nirmmitamāda Ī dharmasthānamaṁ parama
naiṣṭhikasthānaṁ māḍi kuḍe paḍedā śrī lakuḷēśvaradēvara gurukuḷakramameṁteṁdaḍe . sūri janaṁgaḷoḷ nuḍiyinī jagadoḷ jaya
vādiyāge kaivārade vēdasāraracitābharaṇānviteyāgi vāṇi kāśmīrade kūḍi baṁdu vijayāpuradoḷ nelasalnegaḷda kāśmīramu
nīṁdranoḷnuḍige sōladarārnnuḍidaṁdu tārkkikar . Ā dibyamunige śiṣyarvvēdāṁta vidarssamasta śāstrārttha kaḷābhēda viśēṣajñarparavādima
hāpraḷaya kālabhairavadēvar . Avara śiṣyaru . niratiśaya jñānāmṛtasaranidhiyoḷu parama tatvabhāvaneyaḷavaṭṭire taṁnoḷakhiḷayō
gīśvaradēvamunīṁdraresadaramaḷacaritrar . Avaragraśiṣyarī bhūbhavanajanakkabhimatārttha siddhiyanīyalu śivane yatirūpamaṁ taḷedavatarisida
nenisidarvvarēśvaradēvar . viśvaṁbhare baṇnisaluvarēśvaradēvargge śiṣyarādar śrī yōgīśvara dēvarpparamamunīśvarasaṁstutyacaritarapagataduritar .
Ene negaḷda paramanaiṣṭhikamunipara śiṣyarssamastalōkōttamarī vananidhiparivṛtadhātrīvinu tarllakuḷīśvarabratīśvararesedar . sakaḷajñaṁ śivata
tvavēdi manumārgaṁ taṁna cāritradiṁ sakaḷōrbbīvaḷayaṁ pavitrataramāyteṁbaṁnegaṁ mikka naiṣṭhikacūḍāmaṇi lākuḷāgama sudhāṁbhōrāśitā
rādhipaṁ lakuḷīśabratiyeṁdu baṇnipudiḷābhāgaṁ manōrāgadiṁ . Iṁtu negaḷda . śrīlaku ḷīśapada prakṣālanaṁ māḍi koṭṭanī sthānamanī bhūlō
kamaṟiye tāṁ kai mēlāgire dhāreyeṟedu sale śivarājaṁ . taṁnaya vṛttiya keyyaṁ paṁniṁ 12 mattaranadakka dēvarttiṟuvarppaṁnoṁdu 11 paṇa
maneṁdūrmmannise paḍedittanābaḷiya moge sahitaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarbbānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthi
vēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdra . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyūṁ jāyatē kṛ
mī . © mattamoṁduttarōttaraṁ . śrīmabbijjaladēvanṛpāmātyaṁ daṁḍanāthacūḍā ratnaṁ śrīmaiḷāracamūpaṁ sāmajaripuvikramaṁ parā
kramabhīmaṁ . krūrārātikapāḷamaṁ ripukarabyagraykatībrāsiyaṁ vairibrātakarōḍi māleyumanugrāṭōpamaṁ bhīkarākāraṁ betta
le raudramūrttiyumanī daṁḍādhipaṁ vīramaiḷāraṁ tōruvanājiṟaṁgadoḷ mitrānīka mutkaṁpisal . raṇadoḷuṟadāṁtaraṁ vitaraṇadoḷu kai
yā�reṟaḍamōḍisi sale kaiguṇamaṁ tōṟuva raṇavitaraṇaśūraṁ daṁḍanāyakaṁ maiḷā� tarddavāḍināḍaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipā
ḷanadiṁdāḷdu nāḍarasugeyyuttirddā baṇnigedaṟeyadhikāramaṁ tāṁ kuḍe paḍedā paramēśvaraṁ perggaḍe baṁmarasaṁ śrī śivaliṁgadēvargge .
karaṇaṁgaḷanugrahadiṁ dhare pogaḷalu negaḷda murttageya baṇnigeyoḷe sthiramāgiroṁdu poṁnaṁ variṣaṁprati naḍeye koṭṭanāḷdana
numatadiṁ . © dōrbbaḷabhīmaṁ ripukuḷaparbbatakuḷiśāyudhaṁ parākramadhananainū rbbara saṁnāhaṁ sakaḷōrbbareyoḷ caṭṭiseṭṭi bīrara bīraṁ .
samaradhuraṁdharanātana kumaraṁ naḍegōṭemallanarihṛtsellaṁ samayasamuddharaṇaṁ vikrama tuṁga nāciseṭṭi vairigharaṭṭaṁ . kāṁtiya perṁmma
bolatidhairyada śauryyada gurbbuvetta vikrāntada naṁniyuṁnatikeyaṁ naṟe tāḷdida nāciseṭṭi nairantaramāgiralke śivaliṁga
mahāmahimaṁge nāgavāḍaṁ tanagīva bīravaṇadartthamanāvagamittanartthiyiṁ . dharaṇī vallabharuṁ pradhānapuruṣarddaṁḍādhiparnnāḍanāḷva
rasarpperggaḍegaḷsamastakaraṇaṁgaḷnāḍugaḷmattamī puradādiprabhugaḷmahājanamumārāydaṁ dumī dharmmamaṁ paripāḷippudu tamma dharmma
midu tāṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ . © śrīmatu kēśavadēvara kaḷaśārōpaṇadalu śrīmadū roḍeya pramukhamaśēṣama
hājanaṁgaḷu biṭṭa keyi nālkeneya viṭṭapayyaṁgaḷa pannasinalu ḍōṇiyiṁ baḍagalu śivarā jana vṛttiya mattaru 4 Ā
pannasinalu gōpatighaḷisāsara magaṁ rēcaṇaghaḷisāsara kaiyalu śrīlakuḷēśvaradēvaru dhāregoṇḍu biṭṭa keyi mā
sīmeyiṁ teṁkalu śivarājaṁ biṭṭa haṁnimattariṁ baḍagalu mattaru 5 Antu mattaru 9 Ītiruvaṟuvaṇaṁ paṇa mā
gaḍiya nāgarasana kaiyyalu lakuḷīśvaradēvaru dhāregoṇḍu biṭṭa sarvvanamaśyada tōṁṭa kōṭerājana tōṁṭadiṁ paḍuvalu gōviṁda
rasara heṁmadōṁṭadiṁ baḍagalu kamma 7 . ©
Digital edition of SII 15.32 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
